'''chayumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ngurungaeta|ngurungaeta]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-y-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ngurungaeta|ngurungaeta]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chayumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæyimith|chæyimith]] || [[word:chæyimij|chæyimij]] || [[word:chæyimish|chæyimish]] || [[word:chæyimi|chæyimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chayuyumuth|chayuyumuth]] || [[word:chayuyumuj|chayuyumuj]] || [[word:chayuyumush|chayuyumush]] || [[word:chayuyumu|chayuyumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chayumuth|chayumuth]] || [[word:chayumuj|chayumuj]] || [[word:chayumush|chayumush]] || [[word:chayumu|chayumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chayufmuth|chayufmuth]] || [[word:chayufmuj|chayufmuj]] || [[word:chayufmush|chayufmush]] || [[word:chayufmuf|chayufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chayumuthu|chayumuthu]] || [[word:chayumuju|chayumuju]] || [[word:chayumushu|chayumushu]] || [[word:chayumuku|chayumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chayumuth|chayumuth]] || [[word:chayumuj|chayumuj]] || [[word:chayumush|chayumush]] || [[word:chayumu|chayumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chayumuthul|chayumuthul]] || [[word:chayumujul|chayumujul]] || [[word:chayumushul|chayumushul]] || [[word:chayumukul|chayumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chayumuthuthu|chayumuthuthu]] || [[word:chayumujuju|chayumujuju]] || [[word:chayumushushu|chayumushushu]] || [[word:chayumuku|chayumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chayumuthun|chayumuthun]] || [[word:chayumujun|chayumujun]] || [[word:chayumushun|chayumushun]] || [[word:chayumukun|chayumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chayumuthuoro|chayumuthuoro]] || [[word:chayumujuoro|chayumujuoro]] || [[word:chayumushuoro|chayumushuoro]] || [[word:chayumukuoro|chayumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
